copy.heroSubtitle: Forward your confirmation emails, we extract everything automatically.
copy.importSubtitle: Connect your email or scan your confirmations — everything imports automatically.
copy.syncSubtitle: Transport automatically integrates into your schedule.

page.heroSubtitle: Forward your confirmation emails, we extract everything automatically. Flight delayed? You'll know before the airline tells you.
page.socialProofText: All your journeys in one place

faqItems.question: How do I import my transport bookings?
faqItems.answer: Three ways: forward your confirmation emails, connect Gmail/Outlook for automatic import, or scan your ticket QR code.

faqItems.question: What types of transport are supported?
faqItems.answer: All of them! Flights, trains, buses, ferries, car rentals, and even rideshares.

faqItems.question: Do I get alerts for delays?
faqItems.answer: Yes, Weplanify monitors your flights and trains in real time. If there's a delay, you get an instant notification.

faqItems.question: Can my travel group see the transport details?
faqItems.answer: Yes! All trip participants can see the added transport.

faqItems.question: Can I access my tickets offline?
faqItems.answer: Absolutely. Download your tickets to access them even without an internet connection.

page.ctaSubtitle: All your journeys accessible in 2 seconds, even offline
page.seoTitle: Transport Management - Flights, Trains & Journeys | Weplanify
page.seoDescription: Manage all your travel journeys in one place. Automatic import of flights and trains, real-time alerts, and offline access to your tickets.
